notes:
Native works, for playing with controller manual key assignment is needed - but only once.
No fullscreen
title: The Binding of Isaac: Rebirth

notes: The native version of this game runs perfectly on my desktop running Manjaro Linux however I like to play this game on my laptop which runs Wayland Gnome on Fedora. and the native version will not even launch through Wayland. However the Proton version does work, sometimes perfectly and sometimes with some audio stuttering. I played around a bit trying to fix the audio but will update if I find a fix.
title: The Binding of Isaac: Rebirth

notes: Native version did not work on sway (Wayland) with the flatpak runtime. Did work flawlessly trough proton. Maybe some slight freezes upon pickup or when first playing an effect, akin to shader compilation, but I am not sure that's due to Proton, and it now plays flawlessly. Did not try a controller, and fullscreen is handled slightly differently under sway (I used a keybinding), so I cannot comment on those points.
title: The Binding of Isaac: Rebirth
